subject: Accounting
title: The Future of Bookkeeping
description: A micro-lesson that makes The Future of Bookkeeping usable.

hook.text: AI can now categorize transactions, flag anomalies, and draft financial reports automatically.

buildup.text: Machine learning models improve over time—learning a business's patterns and reducing manual work.

discovery.text: The bookkeeper's role is shifting from data entry to data review, exception handling, and advisory.

twist.text: Despite predictions, bookkeeping won't disappear. The tools change, but oversight remains essential.

climax.text: The future bookkeeper is part tech-savvy reviewer, part trusted advisor to small businesses.

punchline.text: Machines will enter the data. Humans will ensure it's right.

quiz.question: How is the bookkeeper's role changing?
options: Shifting from data entry to review and advisory
